function.name: llr_scaling
function.signature: static void llr_scaling(int16_t *llr, int llr_len, uint8_t *llr_scaled, int8_t llr_size, int8_t llr_decimal, int8_t nb_layers, int8_t Qm)

bug.description: scheduling priority inversion where lower-priority traffic is served before higher-priority

prompt:
There is a scheduling priority inversion where lower-priority traffic is served before higher-priority downstream of function llr_scaling in the openair1/PHY/CODING subsystem.
The function is located at openair1/PHY/CODING/nrLDPC_coding/nrLDPC_coding_aal/nrLDPC_coding_aal.c:1173.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
